name: Cheesy Beer Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook and stir onion and garlic in the spread in a large saucepan over medium-high heat until tender.
2. Reduce heat to medium-low.
3. Add Velveeta, milk, beer, Worcestershire sauce, and hot pepper sauce.
4. Cook, stirring constantly for 5 minutes or until the Velveeta is melted and the soup is hot.
5. Pour into 4 serving bowls; sprinkle with sliced green onion (if using).
